a:r.a:t: Discussion with Bharat & Willie · CIO hiring / staffing needs
Delta-neutral exposure to perp exchange LP pools (JLP, GLP/GM). Captures trading fees & borrowing revenue.
Concentrated & full-range liquidity across AMMs. Active position management to optimize fee capture vs. impermanent loss.
Strategies on yield-splitting protocols (e.g. Pendle) to isolate fixed vs. variable rate exposure.
Leveraged supply-side: deposit → borrow → re-supply to amplify net lending yield.
Systematic allocation across lending markets & vaults for highest risk-adjusted supply rates.
Native & liquid staking across PoS networks. Includes restaking and LST yield optimization.
Systematic covered call writing on BTC/ETH via Deribit. Captures vol premium via theta decay.
Long spot, short perp. Yield source: funding rate collection from persistent spread.
Cross-venue funding rate capture. Long on paying venue, short on charging. Market-neutral.
UPCOMING: Higher yield BTC product (Marissa) · ETH/SOL higher yield products (Bharat/Willie)
